author: barnabasbusa
content: So the geth we're running (mariusvanderwijden-ssz-engine-api, commit 85445ac, the latest published) advertises SSZ for amsterdam only. Earlier forks aren't in supported_forks, so consensoor has nothing to negotiate for fulu and stays on JSON-RPC there — exactly as observed.

author: barnabasbusa
content: I'm trying to test the branch but only seems to support amsterdam, but amsterdam is not properly implemented yet in geth

author: mariusvanderwijden
content: Fixed, the routes were implemented, just not advertised

author: junsong_eth
content: yeah just had a same problem while interoping. My current local setup starts from Fusaka
